content.cn_text: 请大家注意。
content.en_text: Could I have your attention please gather round.

content.cn_text: 我叫帕特里夏，我将带领你们参观悉尼天文台。
content.en_text: My name is Patricia and I'll be your guide around The Sydney observatory.

content.cn_text: 你们都知道，人类对夜空感兴趣已经有很长时间了。
content.en_text: Now, as you all will know, man has been interested in the night sky for a very long time.

content.cn_text: 的确，在指南针发明之前，水手们用它来导航世界上的海洋，你可以说它是一种“星图”。
content.en_text: Indeed, before the invention of the compass, it was used by sailors to navigate their way across the world's oceans, a kind of "star map",you could say.

content.cn_text: 现在，天文台山上的博物馆遗址有自己有趣的故事。
content.en_text: Now, the site of the museum on Observatory Hill has its own interesting story.

content.cn_text: 在殖民者到来之前，它属于Cadigal人，他们甚至可能从这里看到了新游客的到来，因为这里是悉尼港的最高点。
content.en_text: Before the colonizers arrived, it belonged to the Cadigal people, who may have even viewed ]the arrival of the new visitors from here, as this is the highest natural point in Sydney Harbour.

content.cn_text: 早期的欧洲人随后在这里建造了一座风车，但由于其暴露的位置，它并没有持续太久。
content.en_text: The early Europeans then built a windmill on the site though it didn't last for long due to its exposed position.

content.cn_text: 在那之后不久，这块土地被用来建造一个堡垒，最终成为了你今天看到的天文台。
content.en_text: A little while after that, the land was used to build a fort, which was to finally become the observatory that you see before you today.

content.cn_text: 现在，让我们看看里面。
content.en_text: Now, let's take a look inside.

content.cn_text: 在正门的左边是衣帽间，您可以在那里放置您的外套和包，但请确保您没有留下任何手机或贵重物品，因为工作人员不负责。
content.en_text: To the left of the main entrance is the cloakroom where you can leave your coats and bags, but please make sure you don't leave any mobiles or valuables as staff cannot be held responsible.

content.cn_text: 博物馆白天开放到下午5点，所以请在5点15分之前领取物品，并在5点30分之前撤离。
content.en_text: The museum is open during the day until 5 pm, so please collect belongings no later than 5.15 and please vacate the building by 5.30.

content.cn_text: 下午4时30分后将不再开放。
content.en_text: No new admissions will be allowed after 4.30 pm.

content.cn_text: 离开你的个人物品后，你需要在你身后的售票处买票，然后再继续剩下的旅行。
content.en_text: After you've left your personal,you'll need to buy your tickets from the ticket desk immediately behind you, before continuing on the rest of the tour.

content.cn_text: 正常价格是成人8美元，儿童6美元，不过最多四人的团体可以通过购买家庭套餐来省钱。
content.en_text: The normal price is $8 for an adult and $6 for a child, though groups of up to four people can save money by buying a family.

content.cn_text: 这必须包含至少一个成人和一个孩子，但每个成人不超过两个孩子。
content.en_text: This must contain at least one adult and one child but no more than two children per adult.

content.cn_text: 我在咖啡厅的检票口那边等你，你们去买票。
content.en_text: I'll wait for you on the other side of the ticket barrier by the coffee shop while you all get your ticket.

content.cn_text: 所以，我希望你们喜欢这次旅行，但在我离开之前，我只想让你们注意另外一件事。
content.en_text: So, I hope you enjoyed the tour but before I leave you, I just want to draw your attention to one more thing.

content.cn_text: 您的观景台门票还允许您以50%的价格参观悉尼的另一个著名景点。
content.en_text: Your Observatory ticket also entitles you to visit another of Sydney's famous sights at a 50%.

content.cn_text: 你会发现有很多节目可以让孩子们娱乐。
content.en_text: You'll find lots on to keep the children entertained .

content.cn_text: 例如，他们有声音工作室，在那里你可以尝试成为DJ。
content.en_text: For example, they've got sound workshops where you can have a go at being a DJ.

content.cn_text: 这被称为声音，你会在二楼找到它，就在儿童游乐场后面。
content.en_text: This is called the sound , and you'll find it up on the second floor, just after the kid's playground.

content.cn_text: 如果你迷路了，寻找Vectorlab实验室的标志。
content.en_text: Look for signs for the Vectorlab lab]if you get lost.

content.cn_text: 如果你对时尚和设计感兴趣，蕾丝研究中心是不容错过的。
content.en_text: For those of you interested in fashion and design, the Lace Study Centre should not be missed.

content.cn_text: 你将有机会在一个地方看到这个国家最好的收藏之一。
content.en_text: You'll get the chance to look at one of the country's best collections all in one place.

content.cn_text: 然而，像大多数博物馆一样，只有一小部分藏品真正展出，但在博物馆的niqno探索中心，你可以借此机会走到幕后，看看没有展出的部分藏品。
content.en_text: However, like most museums, only a fraction of their collections are actually on display, but in the museum's niqno Discovery Centre, you can take the opportunity to go behind the scenes and see parts of the collection that are not on display.

content.cn_text: 所有这些景点都可以在悉尼著名的动力博物馆里找到。
content.en_text: All of these attractions can be found under one roof at Sydney's famous powerhouse museum.

content.cn_text: 我真的希望你能去享受这段经历。
content.en_text: 1 do hope you are able to go and enjoy the experience.

content.cn_text: 你不会失望的!
content.en_text: You won't be disappointed!

groups.desc:
Questions 11-15
Choose the correct letter, A, B or C.

items.title: Humans have long been using the stars to
items.analysis: 文中明确指出在指南针发明之前，水手们使用夜空（星星）来在世界的海洋上导航。这表明他们利用星星进行长距离航行。"世界的海洋"暗示了长距离航行，而不是在河流或近海航行。因此，C选项"sail long distances"最准确地反映了原文的意思。

items.title: The building constructed by the first Europeans at the observatory was
items.analysis: 文中明确指出早期欧洲人（即第一批欧洲人）在这个地点建造了一座风车。这是欧洲人在该地点的第一个建筑物，因此B选项"a windmill"是正确答案。虽然后文提到了堡垒（fort），但那是在风车之后建造的，不符合题目中"first"的要求。

items.title: In the cloakroom, people are advised not to leave
items.analysis: 文中明确指出不要在衣帽间留下手机或贵重物品（valuables），因为工作人员不对这些物品负责。"valuables"与题目选项中的"expensive items"（昂贵物品）是同义词，因此B选项是正确答案。题目询问人们被建议不要留下的物品，而不是可以留下的物品，这一点需要特别注意。

items.title: The museum does not allow visitors to stay after
items.analysis: 文中明确指出访客必须在5:30之前离开博物馆（"please vacate the building by 5.30"）。题目询问博物馆不允许访客在何时之后停留，这与离开时间直接对应。因此，5:30是访客必须离开的最后期限，也就是博物馆不允许访客在此之后停留的时间。

items.title: The family ticket allows entrance to
items.analysis: 文中明确说明家庭票必须包含至少一个成人和一个儿童，但每个成人不能超过两个儿童。根据这个条件，家庭票最多可以包含两个成人和两个儿童。因此，选项C"two adults and two children"是符合这个描述的唯一正确答案。

groups.desc:
Questions 16-20
Which attraction matches the questions?
Choose FIVE answers from the box and write the correct letter, A-F, next to questions 16-20.
groups.title: ATTRACTIONS

items.title: Which of the tickets gives people a discount?
items.analysis: 文中明确提到天文台（Observatory）的门票可以让游客以50%的折扣参观另一个著名景点。50%在这里明显表示折扣，而题目正是在询问哪个门票提供折扣。因此，Observatory（天文台）门票是唯一提供折扣的选项，所以F是正确答案。

items.title: Which of the venues is located near the recreation area for children?
items.analysis: 正确答案是B. Sound house，因为原文中明确提到"sound house"位于二楼，紧邻儿童游乐场（"just after the kid's playground"）。题目中的"recreation area for children"与原文中的"kid's playground"是同义表达，而"sound house"被描述为位于这个区域附近，符合题目要求的"located near the recreation area for children"。

items.title: Which part should people visit if they are interested in clothes?
items.analysis: 文中提到"For those of you interested in fashion and design"，这直接对应了题目中询问的"interested in clothes"。随后介绍的Lace Study Centre（蕾丝研究中心）是与时尚和设计密切相关的场所。蕾丝是一种常用于服装设计的面料，因此Lace Study Centre是最符合题目要求的选项。此外，原文还强调这里有"country's best collections"，进一步证实了这个场所对于对服装感兴趣的人的重要性。

items.title: Which part offers an unusual service for a museum?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是C. Discovery Centre，因为原文提到Discovery Centre提供了一种独特的服务，让参观者可以"go behind the scenes"（走到幕后），看到通常不对外展示的收藏品。这种服务与普通博物馆的参观体验不同，符合题目要求的"unusual service"（不寻常的服务）。文中用"unique"（独特的）来描述Discovery Centre，进一步强调了这种服务的特殊性。

items.title: Which place houses all of the attractions mentioned?
items.analysis: 这道题的正确答案是A. Powerhouse，因为文中明确指出所有提到的景点都可以在悉尼的动力站博物馆（Powerhouse Museum）找到。这句话出现在听力材料的最后，作为一个总结性陈述，概括了之前提到的所有景点。题目要求找出"哪个地方包含了所有提到的景点"，而动力站博物馆正是唯一一个被描述为包含所有这些景点的地方。
